queue_item.action: Model and preserve divergence between the canonical queue snapshot and additive queue-update journal without overwriting either source.

progress.finding: ACTIVE_QUEUE.json is a stale materialized snapshot relative to the append-only operations/queue-updates journal; neither layer should silently replace the other.
progress.design_implication: Introduce an authenticated deterministic materializer that validates team ownership and dependencies, rejects duplicate or stale entries, emits a receipt, and updates the canonical snapshot without erasing journal history.
progress.source_scope: Public repository files and commit metadata only
progress.privacy_boundary: No raw private chat, health or pet-health material, credentials, live tokens, identifying personal data, or unreviewed uploads were read into or published by the artifact.

queue_item.handoff: Frontier Research should specify deterministic journal merge and replay semantics; Cloudflare Research should connect workflow identity and invocation receipts to a protected materializer; Vercel Studio and Independent Creative Web should continue writing additive owned queue records until materialization is proven.

next_action: Build a deterministic queue materializer and adversarial tests for reordered, duplicated, stale, malformed, dependency-violating, and cross-owner journal entries, then emit a receipt binding input and output digests.
